reviews.review_description: It is goodish but not great
I played this game and it sucked no arriving on the boats the graphics horiblle controls horrible ai bots
There is no more D day barely anywhere in this game speaks
Full of bots no real people and it’s just bad don’t ever buy
In the trailer it showed the landing beach and tanks in the game you click it it brings you to a valley. And it is so easy to best it and get every thing it took one day to get the entire first page

To start off, the controls are terrible. Like I was just testing out the guns and when I walk straight I go backwards, like what on earth? I know I have a little stick-drift but it’s not anything like that. Also the guns are so confusing. And the game is basically dead. And the only people left are all hackers. There is also no tutorial whatsoever. So in my opinion and everyone else’s, it’s a terrible game.
I love ww2 and the history in it. d-day being the most interesting in my opinion for $4 it’s a good game

reviews.review_title: I want my money back right now
reviews.review_description: This game looks fun,but I wanted to give it a go so I downloaded it and it doesn’t even let me play,it puts me on blade and sorcery!
I want a refund, the games only have bots and no real players, you can't find your ammunition pack if you turn your head in real life.
I lov this gam that I foll into coma playing it and now I pay 5,000 dollar bill I tried suig but gut nuting
Even though not many people play the bots are still pretty challenging
Very amazing game I love the fact that it is like world war 2

Get some friends together and let the good times roll or battle against the AI and level up and gain loads of skins add ons and more. PVP is amazing and community is one of the nicest I've had the pleasure of being apart of.

Recommended.

reviews.review_title: I’m about to try it! UPDATE
reviews.review_description:
I will update review later!!

UPDATE: I enjoyed the game but when it came to picking up guns it was very difficult for me as I can’t find it explained anywhere!! I like this game band it can be very janky at times imo but I like everything in it!! I really hope this just gets a lot of updates mainly fixing the jank and so it runs really smooth!
It’s a little glitchy, but it’s so cool. A large variety of weapons. You get to drive a tank! Speedway in a jeep very fun game.

reviews.review_title: This is a cut down version of PSVR 2
reviews.review_description:
This game has smaller battle maps in size compared to PC, PSVR & PSVR 2. On Quest 2 & 3, there is a 64 player game called Contractors Showdown. It has a detailed 16 km map and has smooth mechanics. I wonder what people will pick, this game with lag and tiny maps or Contractors Showdown that runs smoothly on quest 2 and 3.

This is why the game is not selling well, this game always ran laggy since the first PSVR and all versions  are unoptimized. It would be nice to see this get better, I am not counting on it since it never did in the past on PSVR, PSVR 2 or PC. This game is also low poly, how can it run so terribly on every platform it touches.
I loved this game on PSVR2, and now it’s come to Quest! Should you buy this game? All signs point to yes!
